Room.title: Room
Room.description: A chat room with password protection and cleanup status.

users.description: List of user IDs in the room.

finishStatus.description: Map of user ID to boolean status for finishing the chat.

lastActivity.description: Timestamp of the last activity in the room.

typing.description: Map of user ID to typing status.

userId.description: The ID of the user who sent the message.

/rooms/{roomId}/messages/{messageId}.description: Subcollection of messages for a specific room.
